name: Carmen's Shrimp with Feta
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Flat leaf parsley, finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat enough olive oil in a large skillet to coat the bottom of the pan.
2. Toss the shrimp in the oil until they turn color, about 1-2 minutes. Remove the shrimp and set aside.
3. In a saucepan, prepare the sauce by heating 1/8 cup olive oil over medium heat.
4. Add the onions and sauté until softened, about 5 minutes.
5. Stir in the garlic and cook for an additional 30 seconds.
6. Add the tomatoes, sugar, white wine, parsley, salt, and pepper. Simmer for 10-15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
7. Divide the sauce among 6 individual bake dishes or serving plates.
8. Garnish with additional chopped parsley and serve hot.
